articles.title: Novelis recognised for 100% scrap product
articles.summary: Novelis received the MMK Award of Excellence 2026 for a fully circular aluminium sheet produced from 100% end-of-life vehicle scrap, qualified for exterior automotive body panel applications.

articles.title: Aludium Eco expanding with 'Closed Loop' — a new low-emissions product range
articles.summary: Aludium will expand its Aludium Eco product line in 2026 with a 'Closed Loop' sub-range using a high percentage of recycled aluminium to reduce carbon footprint and meet customer circular economy targets.
articles.novelis_angle: Aludium directly competing on recycled-content premium sheet mirrors Novelis's product positioning, raising competitive pressure in the European flat-rolled market for sustainability-driven customers.

articles.title: Aluminum beverage can recycling rate hits 75% globally
articles.summary: An Eunomia report released ahead of COP30 found that global aluminium beverage can recycling rates have reached 75%, the highest of any packaging material and ahead of glass and PET.
articles.novelis_angle: A 75% global can recycling rate validates the closed-loop economics underlying Novelis's can body sheet business and its £90M Latchford recycling hub expansion, reinforcing the case for brand owners to sustain recycled-content commitments.

articles.title: From policy to recycling loops: sustainability push and recycled aluminium reshape global value chains
articles.summary: EU PPWR, which becomes fully mandatory in August 2026, and the operational phase of CBAM are jointly accelerating closed-loop recycled aluminium investment while making high-carbon primary aluminium imports more expensive for European buyers.
articles.novelis_angle: The simultaneous activation of PPWR recycled-content mandates and CBAM carbon pricing creates a structural policy tailwind for Novelis's high-recycled-content FRP products and penalises primary-aluminium-dependent competitors.
